author: IGN YouTube
text:
Marvel Rivals - Official ‘Weapon M’ Cyclops Costume Trailer
Don't miss the ‘Weapon M’ Cyclops Costume Trailer for Marvel Rivals, the hit action team-based shooter developed by NetEase Games. Players will be able to gain access to a new Weapon M skin for Cyclops, a look inspired by the shaky costs of unrestricted experimentation. Get the ‘Weapon M’ Cyclops Costume in Marvel Rivals on June 12 with Season 8.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Crimson Moon - Official Release Window Trailer
Crimson Moon gets a new trailer showcasing brutal gameplay and a release window announcement. Watch the latest Crimson Moon trailer for this upcoming Gothic High Renaissance action-adventure RPG built around intense, replayable missions. In Crimson Moon, enter the fallen city of Gildenarch and face new enemies and brutal battles, while mastering powerful Nephilim abilities across a dark, replayable world built for relentless hunts and unforgettable encounters. Fight alone or bring a second Nephilim into battle as you push deeper into the city and uncover what waits beyond. 

Crimson Moon will be available on PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X/S, Steam, and Epic Games Store in September 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Can Fans Beat IGN Hosts at Super Smash Bros. Ultimate? - IGN Live 2026
IGN Host Alyek stopped by the Game With IGN Booth at IGN Live 2026, where fans got the chance to go head-to-head with IGN staff in Super Smash Bros. Ultimate on the latest Samsung OLED TVs. 

Presented by Samsung.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Pipes.exe - Official Announcement Trailer
Take a look at the Pipes.exe announcement trailer for this upcoming cooperative horror game. In this corporate venture to advance market-leading collaborative capabilities, employees will investigate software bugs that may or may not be demons, repair unstable systems together while coordinating (or panicking) over voice chat, and attempt to survive escalating environmental threats inside an immersive, '90s-inspired digital workspace. Welcome to the team! Pipes.exe will be available on PC.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Final Fantasy Resonance - Official Game Overview Trailer
Don't miss the Game Overview Trailer for Final Fantasy Resonance, an HD 2D turn-based RPG developed by Square Enix. Players will embark on an adventure calling back to the series' roots as party members brought together by fate set out to save the world once more. Summon Visions of iconic Final Fantasy characters from past games, engage in strategic battles, and explore a suite of side content in cinematic pixel-art style. Final Fantasy Resonance is launching on October 22 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Jurassic World Evolution 3 - Official Mutadon Trailer
Meet the Mutadon in this latest Jurassic World Evolution 3 trailer for the park management sim game. Combining the cunning hunting abilities of the Velociraptor with the Pterosaur’s dominance of the air, this calculated predator poses a serious challenge to contain. Jurassic World Evolution 3 is out now on PC, PlayStation 5 (PS5), and Xbox Series X|S. The Jurassic World Evolution 3: Rebirth expansion will be available on June 16, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Fable - Official 'Build An Extraordinary Life' Gameplay Demo
Check out the 'Build An Extraordinary Life' Gameplay Demo for Fable, the upcoming action-adventure RPG developed by Playground Games. Players can get a developer-led look at the upcoming addition to the Fable franchise, showing off settlements filled with NPCs, dialogue choices with consequences, and a look at combat. Fable is launching on February 23, 2027 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Xbox Game Pass, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Moana - Official Final Trailer (2026) Catherine Lagaʻaia, Dwayne Johnson, John Tui
The ocean chose them. Watch the final trailer for Moana, an upcoming live-action film reimagining of the animated adventure. Moana stars Catherine Lagaʻaia as the wayfinder Moana and Dwayne Johnson, who reprises his role as the trickster demigod Maui.

Moana is directed by Emmy and Tony Award winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films Moana and Moana 2. Moana features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. 

Moana opens in theaters on July 10, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Gothic 1 Remake - 6 Things You Need to Know
After 25 years, Gothic is back with the release of Gothic 1 Remake. The classic RPG has been rebuilt from the ground up for modern consoles thanks to the implementation of current-gen graphics, all while preserving the gameplay that makes Gothic 1 a classic. If you’re new to the series or it’s been a while since your own visit to the Valley of the Mines, here are 6 things you need to know, including: the story of Gothic 1, its unique gameplay mechanics, similarities and differences between the original Gothic, and more.
Presented by THQ Nordic.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Minecraft Dungeons 2 - Official Developer Gameplay Overview Trailer
Take a look at the Developer Gameplay Overview Trailer for Minecraft Dungeons 2, the next installment in the isometric action-adventure game developed by Mojang Studios. Players will get more information regarding the game's story, characters, and gameplay from Laura, Carlos, and Kevin on the development team. Minecraft Dungeons 2 is launching on September 29 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Xbox Cloud, Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC (Steam and Xbox on PC).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Halo: Campaign Evolved - Official 'Assault on the Control Room' Gameplay Demo
Don't miss the 'Assault on the Control Room' Gameplay Demo for Halo: Campaign Evolved, a remake of the original Bungie-developed first-person sci-fi shooter developed by Halo Studios. Players can get an in-depth look at the full Assault on the Control Room mission, packed with over 28 minutes of gameplay. Halo: Campaign Evolved is launching on July 28 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam), with the Premium Edition or Collector’s Edition getting players up to 5 days early access beginning July 23.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Hellmart - Official Major Update Trailer
The major HELLMART update is out now, featuring new unique customers and strange night visitors, alongside the new “Extended Shift” mode and fresh content. Experience a more classic store simulator with longer progression, multiple difficulty levels, shop decoration, product purchasing, inventory upgrades, new ways to survive the monster’s invasion, and more.

HELLMART on Steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/app/3762550/HELLMART/

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Captain Tsubasa 2: World Fighters - Official Battle of the Strongest Trailer
22 national teams: one dream. Watch the latest Captain Tsubasa 2: World Fighters trailer for the upcoming soccer sports game to see gameplay and more. Captain Tsubasa 2: World Fighters will be available on PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X/S, and Steam on August 28, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
NBA The Run Review
NBA The Run reviewed by Nico Vergara on PC, also available on Xbox Series X|S and PlayStation 5.

NBA The Run plays more like a distant descendant of the NBA Street series than a successor, which isn’t a bad thing. Although the two share certain traits, like their curated roster of NBA stars and street legends, an ample rotation of carefully crafted courts, and the sultry, ever-present vocals of DJ Bobbito Garcia, The Run’s core principle of online, run-and-gun action over the classic single-player arcade approach makes it a much more exciting and enticing present-day package than its predecessors. Unfortunately, its emphasis on pushing you through a steady flurry of quick matches is also where its biggest weakness lies. While this modern, run-it-up style might work for the first several runs, the games played, highlights made, and championships secured all eventually blur together, turning the excitement of those first title wins old much too soon. That means I was usually ready to pack up and head home before the lights were too low to see the rim, but these runs are still undoubtedly enjoyable in short bursts, and I’m eager to see how future updates might pull me back in for a few more.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Coolest Games You Can Play at IGN Live - IGN Live 2026
IGN Host Alyek tours the hands-on gaming stations across IGN Live, where visitors can play games on Samsung Odyssey Monitors. 
 
Presented by Samsung.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Halo: Campaign Evolved - Official Skulls, Remix, & Co-op Overview Trailer
Check out the Skulls, Remix, & Co-op Overview Trailer for Halo: Campaign Evolved, the remake of the Bungie-developed first-person sci-fi shooter developed by Halo Studios. Players can check out the new gameplay features, such as 42 collectible gameplay-modifying Skulls, Campaign Remix, which adds randomized weapons, altered enemy behavior, and randomized enemy encounters, alongside co-op mode. Halo: Campaign Evolved is launching on July 28 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam), with the Premium Edition or Collector’s Edition getting players up to 5 days early access beginning July 23.
